author: MichaelMcCulloch
summary: Full technique stack: 26 toggleable techniques spanning architecture (activation variants, HybridNorm, MLP width, XSA), training (EMA, SWA, QAT, MTP heads), quantization (variable bit-width, OptRot, GPTQ, pruning, entropy coding), and eval-time augmentation (TTT LoRA, n-gram cache, kNN-LM, TurboQuant KV compression, temperature calibration)
notes: val_bpb to be filled after training runs. All techniques env-var toggled, disabled by default.
